content.text: {"title":"User deploys application","slug":"user-deploys-application","intent":"A release operator needs to publish the current application safely.","story":"The user runs the deploy command from the CLI.","expected_behavior":"The command starts deployment and reports progress.","boundaries":"Rollback behavior is covered separately.","auditable_claims":["The deploy command is user-facing."],"evidence":{"tests":[],"surface":["cli: deploy"],"docs":[]}}
